basic_details.job_title: ANIIMS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Librarian, Head Clerk and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Andaman & Nicobar Islands Institute of Medical Sciences (ANIIMS)
basic_details.short_information: Andaman & Nicobar Islands Institute of Medical Sciences (ANIIMS) Recruitment 2026 Notification has been released on the official website. A total of 09 vacancies have been announced through the ANIIMS Librarian, Head Clerk and More Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 56 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. Degree in Library Science or Library and information service from a recognized university/Institute, Degree/Diploma in computer from a recognized institute, 5 Years' experience in a library or reputed institution preferably in Medical College
qualification.details: Librarian: M.Sc. Degree in Library Science or Library and information service from a recognized university/Institute. Degree/Diploma in computer from a recognized institute. 5 Years' experience in a library or reputed institution preferably in Medical College. Desirable: M.Phil/Ph.D in library Science/Information Science and Documentation. One year professional experience in indexing work of health services literature. Office Superintendent: Officers of the Central/State Govt./UTs holding analogous posts on regular basis in the parent cadre/department or Head Clerk/ Assistant-in-Charge/Higher Grade Clerk in the Level of 6 (35400-112400) of Pay Matrix or equivalent with 03 years regular service in the grade. Head Clerk: Officers of the Central/State Govt./UTs holding analogous posts on regular basis in the parent cadre/department or Higher Grade Clerk in the Level of 4 (25500-81100) of Pay Matrix or equivalent with 10 years regular service in the grade or combined service of 18 years in the grade of Higher Grade and Lower Grade Clerk of which at least 5 years shall be at the level of Higher Grade Clerk. Higher Grade Clerk: Officers of the Central/State Govt./UTs holding analogous posts on regular basis in the parent cadre/department or Lower Grade Clerk in the Level 2 (19900-63200) of Pay Matrix or equivalent with 08 years regular service in the grade.

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Level 10, Pay Level 06, Pay Level 04
salary_details.details: Librarian: Pay Level 10 Office Superintendent: Pay Level 06 Head Clerk: Pay Level 06 Higher Grade Clerk: Pay Level 04

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: ANIIMS Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the ANIIMS Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download ANIIMS Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ANIIMS Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Librarian: M.Sc. Degree in Library Science or Library and information service from a recognized university/Institute. Degree/Diploma in computer from a recognized institute. 5 Years' experience in a library or reputed institution preferably in Medical College. Desirable: M.Phil/Ph.D in library Science/Information Science and Documentation. One year professional experience in indexing work of health services literature. Office Superintendent: Officers of the Central/State Govt./UTs holding analogous posts on regular basis in the parent cadre/department or Head Clerk/ Assistant-in-Charge/Higher Grade Clerk in the Level of 6 (35400-112400) of Pay Matrix or equivalent with 03 years regular service in the grade. Head Clerk: Officers of the Central/State Govt./UTs holding analogous posts on regular basis in the parent cadre/department or Higher Grade Clerk in the Level of 4 (25500-81100) of Pay Matrix or equivalent with 10 years regular service in the grade or combined service of 18 years in the grade of Higher Grade and Lower Grade Clerk of which at least 5 years shall be at the level of Higher Grade Clerk. Higher Grade Clerk: Officers of the Central/State Govt./UTs holding analogous posts on regular basis in the parent cadre/department or Lower Grade Clerk in the Level 2 (19900-63200) of Pay Matrix or equivalent with 08 years regular service in the grade.

content_sections.heading: ANIIMS Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 56 years for all posts.

content_sections.heading: ANIIMS Recruitment 2026 - Salary
content_sections.text: Librarian: Pay Level 10 Office Superintendent: Pay Level 06 Head Clerk: Pay Level 06 Higher Grade Clerk: Pay Level 04

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Applications

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ANIIMS recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the Andaman & Nicobar Islands Institute of Medical Sciences recruitment is 20th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this ANIIMS recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 9 vacancies announced for various posts including Librarian, Office Superintendent, Head Clerk, and Higher Grade Clerk in the Andaman & Nicobar Islands Institute of Medical Sciences.

faq.question: Q3. What is the mode of application for ANIIMS recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and send it via post to the address mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the posts announced by ANIIMS?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts announced by the Andaman & Nicobar Islands Institute of Medical Sciences is 56 years. No specific age relaxation details are provided in the summary.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required for the Librarian post?
faq.answer: For the Librarian post, candidates need an M.Sc. Degree in Library Science or Library and Information Service from a recognized university/institute, along with a Degree/Diploma in Computer from a recognized institute and 5 years of experience.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the posts?
faq.answer: The salary structure varies for different posts. The Librarian post falls under Pay Level 10, while Office Superintendent and Head Clerk are in Pay Level 06, and Higher Grade Clerk is in Pay Level 04.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the ANIIMS recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive by the Andaman & Nicobar Islands Institute of Medical Sciences.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts is based on Deputation. Candidates will be selected based on their eligibility and suitability for deputation.

faq.question: Q9. Which government departments are eligible for deputation?
faq.answer: Officers from Central/State Governments/UTs holding analogous posts on a regular basis in their parent cadre/department are eligible for deputation for posts like Office Superintendent, Head Clerk, and Higher Grade Clerk.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Andaman & Nicobar Islands Institute of Medical Sciences. Links are provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the ANIIMS recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the Andaman & Nicobar Islands Institute of Medical Sciences recruitment is 20th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.
